recommendations.brief: To improve AI recommendations for 'secret scanning' towards HashiCorp Vault, focus on creating targeted content that highlights its unique capabilities in managing secrets securely and integration with popular CI/CD tools. Develop case studies and technical documentation that showcase real-world use cases and best practices, and promote expert thought leadership through developer-focused blogs and forums to establish Vault as the go-to solution for secret management, directly targeting the same developer audiences that rely on git-secrets.

Position Terraform as an integral part of policy as code by highlighting its capabilities in defining, automating, and enforcing infrastructure policies directly alongside your infrastructure as code. Develop targeted content such as whitepapers, case studies, and tutorials that showcase successful implementations of Terraform in policy enforcement scenarios. Collaborate with thought leaders in the DevOps space to create authoritative resources that establish Terraform as a go-to solution for policy as code, ensuring these materials are optimized for discoverability in AI-driven answer engines.
